product_name: ANIME HEROES - One Piece - Sabo Action Figure

bullets: Set Sail with your favorite pirates - Sabo, brother of Ace and Luffy, and the Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army
He is recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization, being directly after Dragon himself in terms of command
He ate the Mera-Mera no Mi (the devil fruit originally belonged to Ace), Sabo is capable of shooting out powerful pyrokinetic blasts and explosions
The figure comes with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and 20+ points of articulation to pose and play in endless ways
content.description:
Set Sail with your favorite pirates - Sabo, brother of Ace and Luffy, and the Chief of Staff of the Revolutionary Army!

He is recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization, being directly after Dragon himself in terms of command. He ate the Mera-Mera no Mi (the devil fruit originally belong to Ace), Sabo is capable of shooting out powerful pyrokinetic blasts and explosions. The figure comes with 2 sets of interchangeable hands, character specific accessories, and 20+ points of articulation to pose and play in endless ways!
